title: Purple Rain
why_this_song: Purple Rain by Prince (1984) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 23 times; first heard in: "In the purple rain"
Appears 23 times; first heard in: "In the purple rain"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I only want to see you laughing"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I never meant to cause you any sorrow"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I only wanted one time to see you laughing"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "purple" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "purple" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "rain" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "rain" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I never meant to cause you any sorrow
I only want to see you bathing

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I never meant to cause you any pain
Baby, I could never steal you from another
You say you want a leader

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Prince one question about "Purple Rain", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Prince sobre "Purple Rain", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Purple Rain" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Purple Rain" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Purple Rain" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Purple Rain" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
